title: tecomanthe hillii
intro: Tecomanthe hillii, also known as New Zealand native Tecomanthe, is a flowering plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is a perennial climber with medicinal properties, primarily used for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Tecomanthe hillii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, and its leaves can be dried and used in traditional remedies.
